instruction: Extract structured information from this job description and return valid JSON.
input:
Job Title: Senior AI Engineer
Company: Cortex Labs
Location: Berlin, Germany (Hybrid)
Salary: €80,000 - €110,000 per year
Employment: Full-time

About the role
We're building production RAG systems on top of LLMs.

What you'll do
- Design and ship retrieval-augmented generation pipelines using LangChain and FAISS.
- Train and fine-tune transformer models with PyTorch and Hugging Face.
- Build FastAPI services and deploy on AWS via Docker.
- Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with product.

Required skills
- 5+ years of professional Python experience.
- Strong background in Machine Learning, Deep Learning and NLP.
- Hands-on with LLMs, RAG, and vector databases (FAISS or Chroma).

Preferred qualifications
- Familiarity with TypeScript / Next.js for internal tooling.
- Prior MLOps experience on AWS or Azure.

Education
- Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field.
output: {"job_title": "Senior AI Engineer", "company": "Cortex Labs", "location": "Berlin, Germany (Hybrid)", "salary": "€80,000 - €110,000 per year", "employment_type": "full-time", "remote_type": "hybrid", "required_skills": ["Machine Learning", "Deep Learning", "Python", "Chroma", "FAISS", "LLM", "NLP", "RAG"], "preferred_skills": ["TypeScript", "Next.js", "MLOps", "Azure", "AWS"], "responsibilities": ["We're building production RAG systems on top of LLMs", "Design and ship retrieval-augmented generation pipelines using LangChain and FAISS", "Train and fine-tune transformer models with PyTorch and Hugging Face", "Build FastAPI services and deploy on AWS via Docker", "Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with product"], "qualifications": [], "experience_level": "senior", "education_requirements": ["Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field"], "technologies": ["RAG", "Machine Learning", "Deep Learning", "Hugging Face", "TypeScript", "LangChain", "FastAPI", "PyTorch", "Next.js", "Python", "Chroma", "Docker", "FAISS", "MLOps", "Azure", "LLM", "NLP", "AWS"], "soft_skills": ["Collaboration", "Mentoring"]}

instruction: Extract structured information from this job description and return valid JSON.
input:
Robotics Engineer (Junior)
We're hiring a junior robotics engineer for an on-site role in Munich.

Responsibilities
- Develop ROS2 nodes for autonomous mobile robots.
- Tune PID controllers and validate in Gazebo simulation.
- Prototype control systems in MATLAB / Simulink.

Requirements
- BSc in Robotics, Mechatronics, or Electrical Engineering.
- Experience with ROS, C++, and Python.
